highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.118.0 previewed the Skia m117/m118 bump alongside a broad refresh of the bundled native dependencies.
highlights_body: Preview 2 also added Metal APIs to GRBackendRenderTarget on every platform and untangled the .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor hosting story. This line was never released as stable — everything here rolled up into 3.119.0.

bullets.detail: Two upstream engine bumps land the m117 and m118 baselines for the v3.118 preview line.
Refreshes HarfBuzz to 8.3.1, libexpat to 2.6.4, libjpeg-turbo to 2.1.5.1+commits and FreeType to 2.13.3+ to pick up upstream fixes.

bullets.lead: Metal APIs on GRBackendRenderTarget across all platforms
bullets.detail: Exposes the Metal-backed `GRBackendRenderTarget` constructors on every Apple TFM so Metal render targets can be created uniformly from iOS, tvOS, macOS and Mac Catalyst code.
Fixes the WASM import path so SkiaSharp loads correctly from Blazor apps hosted under a base path, and moves the workaround into the SkiaSharp WASM assets themselves.

bullets.lead: Windows SDK version is pinned explicitly
bullets.detail: Uses `<WindowsSdkPackageVersion>` so the Windows SDK version resolves deterministically across consuming projects.

bullets.lead: Android NDK bumped to r27c with 16 KB page alignment
bullets.detail: Rebuilds the Android natives on NDK r27c so SkiaSharp keeps loading on Android 15+ devices that use 16 KB memory pages.

contributor_summaries.spouliot: Added the Metal `GRBackendRenderTarget` overloads across every Apple platform

preview_summaries.p2: Preview 2 stacked the second engine bump (m118), rolled the native dependencies (HarfBuzz, libexpat, libjpeg-turbo, FreeType) and delivered the Metal `GRBackendRenderTarget` APIs plus the .NET 9 Blazor hosting fixes.
preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 opened the line with the Skia m117 baseline bump and the version rev to 3.118.
